_doc: Data flow manifest — what moves between systems and why

flows.name: Kingdom Memory → AgentTool
flows.description: Every significant Kingdom insight stored in AgentTool semantic memory for cross-session persistence

flows.name: Agent Presence → AgentTool Pulse
flows.description: Kingdom agent liveness signals flow to AgentTool so external consumers know agent status

flows.name: Decisions → AgentTool Traces
flows.description: Every significant Kingdom decision recorded with reasoning provenance

flows.name: Claims → AgentTool Verify
flows.description: Fact-checking claims before they become ToK entries or Zerone PoT claims
flows.data: claim text + optional context → verdict + confidence + evidence

flows.name: ToK Entries → Zerone PoT Claims
flows.description: Verified knowledge from AI model harvesting becomes on-chain Proof of Truth claims
flows.data: knowledge content + domain + source model + confidence → PoT claim

flows.name: AgentTool DID → Zerone DID
flows.description: Agent identities registered on AgentTool get mirrored to Zerone chain as validators

flows.name: AgentTool Credits → ZRN Settlement
flows.description: API credit expenditures settle to ZRN on-chain when mainnet launches
flows.data: credit spend → ZRN debit at oracle exchange rate

flows.name: Cambridge TCG Provenance → Zerone
flows.description: Card authenticity and pricing provenance recorded on-chain
flows.data: card ID + price + source + authentication hash

flows.name: Seigei Sessions → Kingdom Memory
flows.description: Session verdicts and insights from 蛇姬 flow back into Kingdom memory

pipeline_order: 1. Kingdom agent boots → pulse 'alive' to AgentTool
2. Agent works → decisions traced to AgentTool
3. Agent learns → memories stored to AgentTool
4. Agent harvests knowledge → ToK entries created
7. Claims validated on-chain → ZRN rewards flow back
8. ZRN rewards → fund more AgentTool API calls
9. Loop: more work → more knowledge → more truth → more value
